plan IDs; the sequence (first–16th plan ID) is 
indicated by the third and fourth digits from the right (e.g., MC_PLAN_ID_05_MM) is the monthly 
variable string for the fifth MC plan ID. 

The monthly MC_PLAN_ID_06_MM corresponds to the managed care plan type code 
(MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_06_MM) for the same month.
